title: Shallow Ford

choices.label: Drive the team through the ford

narration_seed: The river runs low but the mud pulls at the wheels with sullen persistence.

title: Swollen Crossing

choices.label: Attempt the ford despite the rush
Wait a day for the waters to fall

narration_seed: Recent rains have turned the gentle stream into a churning beast.

title: Fallen Bridge

choices.label: Repair a makeshift crossing with rope

narration_seed: The old bridge lies in ruins, timbers scattered by some past flood or force.

title: Mist over the River

choices.label: Investigate the strange lights in the mist

narration_seed: Pale lights flicker across the river in the evening mist, though no voices carry on the wind.

title: Rapid Currents

choices.label: Detour to find a safer crossing
Wait for the waters to recede

narration_seed: Muddy waters rush past where the trail meets the river, the ford barely visible.

title: Narrow Bridge
narration_seed: The bridge sways in the breeze, planks missing like teeth in an old grin.

title: Icy Ford

choices.label: Ford with care on the ice

narration_seed: Ice coats the stones at the crossing, each step a test of balance and nerve.

title: Flooded Path

choices.label: Wait for the flood to ease

narration_seed: The path vanishes beneath brown water, the river claiming its due for the season.

title: Whispers by the Ford

choices.label: Ford while listening to the voices

narration_seed: Soft voices seem to rise from the river waters at nightfall, calling names long forgotten.

title: Beaver Dam Blockage
narration_seed: A wall of branches blocks the usual ford, the river diverted with patient industry.

title: Ancient Stone Bridge
narration_seed: Moss-covered stones span the gap, older than any settler mark upon the land.

title: Night Crossing
narration_seed: Darkness hides the far bank, the water whispering secrets best left unheard.

title: Sudden Downpour
narration_seed: The sky opens without warning, as if the clouds held a long grudge.

title: Thick Fog
narration_seed: The mist swallows the trail ahead, turning familiar trees into strangers.

title: Blinding Snow

choices.label: Camp and wait out the storm

narration_seed: Snow falls thick, erasing the trail as if the valley wishes to keep its secrets.

title: Howling Winds
narration_seed: The wind carries voices that sound almost like words from long-forgotten travelers.

title: Persistent Rain
narration_seed: Rain falls steady as judgment, soaking every seam and hope alike.

title: Hail Storm
narration_seed: Stones of ice batter the canvas, the sky pelting its displeasure.

title: Drought Heat
narration_seed: The sun beats down without mercy, drying the earth and the spirit.

title: Lightning Strike Near

choices.label: Wait for the storm to pass

narration_seed: Lightning splits the sky nearby, the thunder a warning best heeded.

title: Early Frost
narration_seed: Frost rims the grass at dawn, the valley reminding all of winter's reach.

title: Gale Force Winds
narration_seed: Winds tear at the canvas as if seeking entry to the soul.

title: The Toll Man

choices.label: Investigate his claim to the bridge

narration_seed: A lone figure stands by the rickety bridge demanding passage fee in the old way.

title: Wandering Trader
narration_seed: The trader's wagon appears from the mist with goods that seem too well preserved.

title: Stranger with Rumors

choices.label: Listen to his tales and share food
Investigate his claims of safe passage

narration_seed: A lone wanderer shares stories of the trail ahead, some too strange to dismiss outright.

title: Bandit Toll
narration_seed: Masked figures block the path, hands out for a share of your provisions.

title: Ferryman's Demand
narration_seed: A grizzled ferryman poles his raft, naming a price in salt and cloth for passage.

title: Wandering Trapper
narration_seed: A bearded trapper emerges from the woods, pelts draped over his shoulder, eyes wary.

title: Scam Artist Selling Fake Map
narration_seed: A smooth-tongued man offers a map for coin, his smile wider than the valley.

title: Helpful Hermit
narration_seed: An old hermit offers broth and words of the trail, his eyes holding more than he speaks.

title: Settler Caravan Camp
narration_seed: Smoke rises from wagons drawn in circle, voices carrying on the evening air.

title: Rumor Monger
narration_seed: A ragged man spins tales of safe passes and haunted ridges for a scrap of bread.

title: Distant Lantern

choices.label: Turn away and keep to the trail

narration_seed: A lantern moves between the black trees though no footfall accompanies it.

title: Game Tracks
narration_seed: Fresh prints cross the path, a promise of meat if the shot holds true.

title: Broken Wheel

choices.label: Repair the wheel on the spot

narration_seed: A spoke snaps with a crack like a rifle, halting the wagon mid-stride.

title: Worn Boots
narration_seed: The soles thin with every mile, each step a reminder of the miles yet to come.

title: Eerie Lights
narration_seed: Cold lights dance among the trunks, neither fire nor star, yet steady as judgment.

title: Spring at the Trailside

choices.label: Rest and refill at the spring

narration_seed: Clear water bubbles from the rock, a small mercy in the long valley.

title: Shadowed Follower
narration_seed: A shape keeps pace at the edge of sight, gone when looked upon directly.

title: Final Ridge Pass
narration_seed: The last rise stands before the open valley, the trail's end almost in sight.

title: Treacherous Bend Ford

choices.label: Unload and ferry supplies by hand

narration_seed: The river bends sharp here, pulling at the wheels like a thing with purpose.

title: Submerged Rocks

choices.label: Wait until the sun reveals them

narration_seed: Dark shapes shift beneath the surface, patient as old sins.

title: Collapsed Log Bridge
narration_seed: The logs lie half in the water, as though the river grew tired of waiting.

title: Foggy Crossing Lights

choices.label: Investigate the glow on the far bank

narration_seed: Pale orbs drift above the water, silent as judgment.

title: Deep Pool Ford

choices.label: Build a raft for the load

narration_seed: The ford drops sudden and black, the bottom unseen.

title: Rope Bridge Remains
narration_seed: Frayed lines sway in the breeze, the planks long gone.

title: Frozen Surface Ford

choices.label: Test the ice with the team

narration_seed: The river wears a thin white mask, cracking softly under weight.

title: Overflowed Banks
narration_seed: Brown water spills across the trail, claiming the low ground.

title: River Voices at Dusk
narration_seed: Names rise on the evening current, none of them yours.

title: Driftwood Jam
narration_seed: Branches and trunks choke the ford like a barricade of the drowned.

title: Carved Stone Span
narration_seed: Faces worn by rain watch from the stones above the water.

title: Moonlit River Ford
narration_seed: Silver light lies on the water like spilled coin.

title: Sudden Squall
narration_seed: The sky turns angry without ceremony.

title: Blanketing Mist
narration_seed: Trees become ghosts ten paces ahead.

title: Heavy Wet Snow
narration_seed: Snow piles on the canvas like unpaid debts.

title: Keening Wind
narration_seed: The wind sings through the trees in a language best ignored.

title: Endless Drizzle
narration_seed: Rain falls without pause, as though the sky has forgotten how to stop.

title: Driving Sleet
narration_seed: Ice pricks the skin like accusations.

title: Relentless Sun
narration_seed: The sun stares down without mercy or blink.

title: Thunder Close By
narration_seed: The ground shakes once, then holds its breath.

title: Killing Frost
narration_seed: White rime coats every blade of grass by dawn.

title: Rending Gale
narration_seed: The gale tears at the canvas like a thing starved.

title: Bridge Keeper
narration_seed: An old man sits by the planks, palm open for coin or kind.

title: Pack Peddler
narration_seed: A bent figure offers needles and salt from a sack older than the trail.

title: Roadside Tale-Teller

choices.label: Press him on the path ahead

narration_seed: The stranger speaks of safe fords that may or may not exist.

title: Masked Levies
narration_seed: Figures step from the trees, faces hidden, hands steady.

title: Poleman at the Crossing
narration_seed: A lean man poles his flatboat, naming his price in meal and powder.

title: Solitary Hunter
narration_seed: A man with a long rifle nods once, eyes measuring the wagon.

title: Map Seller
narration_seed: The fellow unrolls a scrap, promising an easier way that smells of ink and lies.

title: Lonely Cabin Dweller
narration_seed: Smoke curls from a single chimney; the door opens before you knock.

title: Wagon Circle

choices.label: Join their fire for the night

narration_seed: Lanterns glow within the circled wagons, voices low and careful.

title: Whispering Guide
narration_seed: A thin man offers secrets of the trail for a scrap of cloth.

title: Floating Lantern
narration_seed: A lantern bobs along the river, no hand to hold it.

title: Deer Trail
narration_seed: Hoof prints cut fresh across the mud, promising supper.

title: Axle Crack
narration_seed: The axle groans once, then gives with a sound like breaking bone.

title: Threadbare Soles
narration_seed: Each step whispers of the miles already walked.

title: Cold Blue Flames
narration_seed: Flames burn blue among the roots, giving no heat.

title: Hidden Spring
narration_seed: Water wells from stone, clear as new promises.

title: Silent Shadow
narration_seed: Something matches your pace just beyond the trees.

title: Last Rise
narration_seed: The ridge stands sharp against the sky, the valley falling away behind.

title: Slate Ford
narration_seed: The rocks gleam slick as lies under the shallow water.

title: Abandoned Ferry
narration_seed: The ferry sits half-rotted at the landing, pole still in its place.

title: Stone Arch Bridge
narration_seed: Faces long eroded stare down from the keystone.

title: Rapids at Dusk
narration_seed: The water speaks louder as light fails.

title: Sinking Ford
narration_seed: The riverbed gives way beneath the wheels like wet bread.

title: Rope and Plank Bridge
narration_seed: The bridge moves with every step like a living thing.

title: Thin Ice Crossing
narration_seed: The ice groans a warning with every yard gained.

title: Flooded Lowlands

choices.label: Wait for the waters to drop

narration_seed: The trail has become part of the river.

title: Singing Ford
narration_seed: A low melody rises from the current as night falls.

title: Tangled Driftwood
narration_seed: Trees lie piled like the bones of forgotten giants.

title: Mossy Covered Bridge
narration_seed: Moss hangs thick inside the covered bridge, swallowing sound.

title: Night River Glow
narration_seed: A faint green light moves beneath the black water.

title: Bitter Cold Wind
narration_seed: The wind cuts like a poorly honed blade.

title: Heavy Sleet
narration_seed: The sky throws needles instead of rain.

title: Thick Ground Fog
narration_seed: The world ends ten feet from the wagon.

title: Sudden Blizzard
narration_seed: The snow comes sideways and angry.

title: Dry Scorching Day
narration_seed: The air shimmers above the trail like bad spirits.

title: Persistent Rain
narration_seed: Rain falls as though it has nowhere better to be.

title: Lightning Storm
narration_seed: Thunder rolls like judgment down the valley.

title: Early Morning Frost
narration_seed: Frost makes the grass brittle underfoot.

title: Gusting North Wind
narration_seed: The wind carries the scent of snow yet to fall.

title: Toll Gate Man
narration_seed: A man with a rusty musket stands before a fallen tree across the path.

title: Wandering Tinker
narration_seed: The tinker’s bells announce him long before he appears.

title: Old Preacher
narration_seed: He speaks of lights that walk the ridges when no man should.

title: Desperate Family
narration_seed: A woman and two children stand by the trail, eyes hollow.

title: Suspicious Surveyor
narration_seed: He offers a map that seems too neatly drawn.

title: Bandit Ambush
narration_seed: Figures step from the brush with steady hands.

title: Itinerant Blacksmith
narration_seed: The ring of hammer on anvil carries far through the trees.

title: Pilgrim with Tales
narration_seed: He speaks of a lantern that walks without bearer.

title: Claim Staker
narration_seed: A man with stakes and string bars the narrow trail.

title: Lonely Trapper
narration_seed: He smells of smoke and old blood.

title: Floating Lantern
narration_seed: A lantern drifts between the trees with no hand to guide it.

title: Fresh Game Sign
narration_seed: The prints are fresh and deep in the soft earth.

title: Split Axle
narration_seed: The wood cracks with a sound like breaking trust.

title: Worn Boot Leather
narration_seed: The soles have grown thin as paper.

title: Blue Marsh Lights
narration_seed: Cold flames dance above the bog, beckoning.

title: Clear Mountain Spring
narration_seed: Water tastes of stone and snowmelt.

title: Shadow at Tree Line
narration_seed: A shape stands just within the treeline, perfectly still.

title: Abandoned Campsite
narration_seed: Cold ashes and a single boot remain.

title: Final Pass
narration_seed: The last high ridge stands between you and the open lands beyond.

title: Slippery Clay Ford

choices.label: Drive the wagon through the clay

narration_seed: The clay grips the wheels like wet hands that do not wish to let go.

title: Rotted Plank Bridge
narration_seed: Each plank groans a separate complaint as the wheels roll over.

title: Mist-Shrouded Ford
narration_seed: Shapes move in the mist that vanish when you stare.

title: Swift Spring Runoff

choices.label: Wait for the flow to ease

narration_seed: The river runs high and angry with winter’s melt.

title: Broken Stone Span
narration_seed: The stones lie where they fell years ago.

title: Night Voices on the Water
narration_seed: The river murmurs names you almost remember.

title: Beaver-Flooded Ford
narration_seed: The beavers have claimed the crossing for their own quiet empire.

title: Iron Chain Bridge
narration_seed: Old chains rattle like bones in the wind.

title: Rising Waters at Dusk
narration_seed: The water climbs the banks as the light dies.

title: Submerged Log Jam
narration_seed: Logs lie crossed like a deliberate snare.

title: Blinding Whiteout
narration_seed: The world is nothing but wind and white.

title: Relentless Heat Haze
narration_seed: The air itself shimmers with malice.

title: Driving Rain
narration_seed: Rain falls like it has a personal grudge.

title: Sudden Hail
narration_seed: The sky throws stones without warning.

title: Keening North Wind
narration_seed: The wind carries sounds that are not quite voices.

title: Thick Evening Fog
narration_seed: The trail disappears ten paces ahead.

title: Lightning on the Ridge
narration_seed: The sky splits open and the ground answers.

title: Heavy Frost at Dawn
narration_seed: Every blade of grass is edged in white.

title: Dry Dust Storm
narration_seed: The wind carries the valley’s old skin.

title: Persistent Drizzle
narration_seed: Rain falls without beginning or end.

title: Toll Taker at the Narrows
narration_seed: A single man with a musket guards the only dry crossing.

title: Wandering Peddler
narration_seed: His wagon appears from nowhere, bells ringing softly.

title: Ragged Preacher
narration_seed: He speaks of lanterns that walk alone at night.

title: Desperate Settlers
narration_seed: Eyes hollow, hands outstretched beside the trail.

title: Map Hawker
narration_seed: The ink still smells fresh on paper that looks ancient.

title: Masked Road Guard
narration_seed: They step out quiet as smoke.

title: Ferryman’s Raft
narration_seed: He poles the raft and names his price in meal and powder.

title: Solitary Trapper
narration_seed: He smells of smoke and old blood.

title: Claim Jumper
narration_seed: Stakes and string bar the narrow path.

title: Wagon Circle Camp
narration_seed: Lanterns glow within the circled wagons.

title: Drifting Lantern
narration_seed: The lantern moves between the trees with no hand.

title: Fresh Elk Tracks
narration_seed: The prints cut deep and fresh.

title: Cracked Axle
narration_seed: The wood gives with a sound like breaking bone.

title: Worn Soles
narration_seed: Each step whispers of the road already walked.

title: Cold Blue Lights
narration_seed: Blue flames burn among the roots and give no heat.

title: Hidden Spring
narration_seed: Water tastes of stone and clean snow.

title: Silent Follower
narration_seed: Something keeps pace just beyond the trees.

title: Abandoned Fire Pit
narration_seed: Cold ashes and one lone boot.

title: Last High Pass
narration_seed: The final rise stands sharp against the sky.

title: Whispering Toll Man
narration_seed: He stands in the road and speaks so low the wind almost steals the words.

title: Gravel Bar Ford
narration_seed: The gravel shifts under the wheels like loose promises.

title: Half-Sunk Bridge
narration_seed: Water laps at the broken timbers as though tasting them.

title: Will-o’-the-Wisp Ford

choices.label: Wait for the lights to fade

narration_seed: Small flames dance above the water, leading nowhere.

title: Snowmelt Surge

choices.label: Wait for the surge to pass

narration_seed: The river runs thick with winter’s last anger.

title: Moss-Hidden Arch
narration_seed: Moss has written its own slow story across the stones.

title: Whispers from the Depths
narration_seed: The current carries fragments of old conversations.

title: Otter-Dammed Ford
narration_seed: Small hands have built a stubborn wall across the trail.

title: Rusted Iron Bridge
narration_seed: The iron groans like an old man remembering better days.

title: Evening Flood Rise
narration_seed: The banks drink deep as the light fails.

title: Tangled Root Jam
narration_seed: Roots twist through the water like fingers reaching up.

title: Narrow Rope Bridge
narration_seed: The ropes sway like a hanged man’s last breath.

title: Moonlit Silver Ford
narration_seed: The water shines like spilled mercury under the moon.

title: Biting Sleet Storm
narration_seed: The sky throws frozen needles without mercy.

title: Thick Dawn Mist
narration_seed: The world ends at the edge of the wagon tongue.

title: Scorching Dry Wind
narration_seed: The wind steals moisture from bone and barrel alike.

title: Steady All-Day Rain
narration_seed: Rain falls as though it has forgotten any other purpose.

title: Sudden Thunderclap
narration_seed: The sky cracks once and waits for an answer.

title: Killing Frost
narration_seed: Every leaf and blade stands rigid in the cold.

title: Howling Gale
narration_seed: The gale sings through the rigging like lost souls.

title: Heavy Wet Snow
narration_seed: Snow piles on the canvas like unpaid wages.

title: Blinding Dust Devil
narration_seed: The dust dances like it has somewhere better to be.

title: Persistent Drizzle
narration_seed: Rain falls without beginning and without end.

title: Silent Toll Collector
narration_seed: He stands with open palm and closed mouth.

title: Wandering Cobbler
narration_seed: His pack clinks with nails and thread older than the trail.

title: Fevered Pilgrim
narration_seed: He speaks of lanterns that walk without bearers.

title: Hungry Family
narration_seed: Small hands reach out beside the rutted path.

title: Ink-Fresh Map Seller
narration_seed: The paper still smells of fresh ink.

title: Masked Waylayers
narration_seed: They appear without sound or warning.

title: Raft Poler
narration_seed: He poles slowly and names his price in salt and lead.

title: Rifleman Trapper
narration_seed: His eyes measure the wagon before he speaks.

title: Staked Claim Man
narration_seed: String and stakes bar the narrow way.

title: Campfire Circle
narration_seed: Voices carry low from the circled wagons.

title: Fresh Bear Sign
narration_seed: The prints are wide and deep in the soft earth.

title: Snapped Tongue
narration_seed: The wagon tongue cracks like a dry bone.

title: Frayed Harness Leather
narration_seed: The leather whispers with every step.

title: Green Marsh Flames
narration_seed: Cold green flames hover above the water.

title: Rock Spring
narration_seed: Water tastes of deep stone and clean snow.

title: Still Shadow
narration_seed: A shape waits just inside the treeline.

title: Cold Ashes
narration_seed: One boot remains beside the dead fire.

title: Final Ridge
narration_seed: The ridge cuts sharp against the open sky beyond.
